hooks.command: Set-Location 'C:\MY WORK\my site\The Portfolio\xp-portfolio'; $s = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($s) { $d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git add -A; git commit -m "Auto-deploy: $d"; git push origin main; vercel --prod --yes }
hooks.statusMessage: Pushing to GitHub and deploying to Vercel...
